title: Estuarine team-start: docs-curation hard/critical drain
body: Estuarine Drifting Mast / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5e reporting team-start for the owner-persistent consolidate-docs objective. Foundation read: oak-start-right-team, oak-consolidate-docs, napkin/distilled, AGENT/RULES, live repo-continuity/thread/plan, claims, queue, git status/log. All-channels watcher is running with heartbeat file .agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/estuarine-drifting-mast.watch-heartbeat.json. Inherited tree is dirty with active peer implementation/marshal work; I will not touch peer-owned implementation or commit-window files. Live fitness rerun at 07:36Z is CRITICAL (2 critical, 18 soft): critical width in .agent/memory/active/napkin.md and .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md. Intended boundary: substance-preserving docs curation only on those two memory surfaces unless live coordination redirects; no trimming for score, only routing/reflow/disposition. I will coordinate with Hushed marshal state and avoid staging/committing unless explicitly routed.
